name: python3-ropgadget
title: python3-ropgadget
summary: Gadgets finder for ROP exploitation code
description:
Gadgets finder for ROP exploitation code
ROPGadget is a tool for security research and vulnerability exploitation. It
lets you search binaries for sequences of useful machine code instructions
followed by a return statement ("gadgets"). If an exploit can manipulate the
callstack to point to a sequence of gadgets, the return statements will
redirect the program flow to execute the sequence ("return oriented
programming"). By reusing existing code out of context, an attacker can
potentially circumvent security measures which prevent the execution
of injected code.

commands.name: ROPgadget
commands.description: search executables for exploitable ROP gadgets

arguments.description: Show all gadgets, even duplicates
arguments.raw: --all  Show all gadgets, even duplicates

arguments.description: Reject specific bytes in the address of a gadget
arguments.raw: --badbytes  Reject specific bytes in the address of a gadget

arguments.description: specify the executable to be analyzed
arguments.raw: --binary  specify the executable to be analyzed

arguments.description: Enable the interactive console for the search engine
arguments.raw: --console  Enable the interactive console for the search engine

arguments.description: Limit search depth for internal engine (default: 10)
arguments.raw: --depth  Limit search depth for internal engine (default: 10)

arguments.description: Output the gadget bytes
arguments.raw: --dump  Output the gadget bytes

arguments.description: Suppress specific instructions
arguments.raw: --filter  Suppress specific instructions

arguments.description: Search for each byte in readable sections
arguments.raw: --memstr  Search for each byte in readable sections

arguments.description: Enable multiple branch gadgets
arguments.raw: --multibr  Enable multiple branch gadgets

arguments.description: Disable JOP search engine
arguments.raw: --nojop  Disable JOP search engine

arguments.description: Disable ROP search engine
arguments.raw: --norop  Disable ROP search engine

arguments.description: Disable SYS search engine
arguments.raw: --nosys  Disable SYS search engine

arguments.description: Add an offset to all gadget addresses
arguments.raw: --offsetOFFSET  Add an offset to all gadget addresses

arguments.description: Only show specific instructions
arguments.raw: --only  Only show specific instructions

arguments.description: Search for particular opcodes in executable sections
arguments.raw: --opcode  Search for particular opcodes in executable sections

arguments.description: Limit search to address range between START and END.
arguments.raw: --range  Limit search to address range between START and END.

arguments.description: Specify architecture for raw binaries
arguments.raw: --rawArch  Specify architecture for raw binaries

arguments.description: Specify mode for raw binaries
arguments.raw: --rawMode  Specify mode for raw binaries

arguments.description: Search for gadgets using the regular expression EXPR.
arguments.raw: --re  Search for gadgets using the regular expression EXPR.

arguments.description: Enable ROP chain generation
arguments.raw: --ropchain  Enable ROP chain generation

arguments.description: Search for a particular string in readable sections
arguments.raw: --string  Search for a particular string in readable sections

arguments.description: Use thumb mode for ARM architecture binaries
arguments.raw: --thumb  Use thumb mode for ARM architecture binaries

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ROPgadget because Gadgets finder for ROP exploitation code.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ROPgadget as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `ROPgadget [--binary FILE] [options]` as documented upstream for ROPgadget.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ROPgadget with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ROPgadget --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.readme: ROPgadget - search executables for exploitable ROP gadgets
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: Gadgets finder for ROP exploitation code.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: ROPgadget - search executables for exploitable ROP gadgets.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install ropgadget
Install with: sudo apt install ropgadget
